overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit exploring the interior of a spacecraft or space station. The character moves from a private quarters area with bathroom facilities and storage shelves into an industrial maintenance corridor with exposed piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew quarters with hygiene facilities and storage

events.description: character turns right to examine the wooden storage shelves
character approaches the exit doorway leading to the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the living quarters, examining the shower area and storage shelves before heading toward the exit

entered.detail: frosted glass shower cubicle with metal fixtures visible in the back of the room
tall wooden shelves stocked with bottles, boxes, and folded linens
small workstation with an illuminated surface and wall-mounted equipment
screen mounted on the wall displaying data or entertainment
metal doorway frame leading to a brightly lit industrial corridor

segments.scene_description: The character explores a compact, warmly lit living quarters with beige walls and red flooring. A glass shower enclosure sits at the far end while wooden shelves line the right wall. The character turns to examine the storage area before approaching the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with exposed infrastructure

events.description: character exits the living quarters and enters the industrial corridor
character looks upward to examine the ceiling pipes and ventilation ducts

agents.ego_description: moving through the industrial corridor and examining the exposed piping and architectural details

entered.detail: long corridor with metal walls, overhead lighting, and industrial flooring extending into the distance
large metal pipes and conduits running horizontally along the corridor walls
rectangular metal ductwork mounted on the ceiling
green plastic storage container sitting on the floor against the wall
machinery and control panels attached to the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the living quarters into a narrow industrial corridor with exposed metal piping and ventilation ducts. The lighting remains artificial but takes on a cooler, more utilitarian tone. The character moves forward through the corridor, then tilts the camera upward to inspect the ceiling infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate warmth of private living quarters into the cold, utilitarian atmosphere of an industrial corridor. It begins within a compact room featuring beige walls and red flooring, where the camera pans past wooden shelves and a glass shower enclosure. As the character moves toward the exit, the scene shifts from the domestic interior into a narrow passageway dominated by exposed metal piping and ventilation ducts. The lighting transitions from a warm glow to a cooler, artificial tone while the camera advances through the hall, finally tilting upward to inspect the complex ceiling infrastructure.
